data.title: Polymarket's forecast for the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in December has fallen to 30%.
data.description: According to Polymarket data, the probability of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in December has fallen to 30%, while the probability of keeping rates unchanged has risen to 68%. The trading volume for this predicted event has reached $123.6 million.

data.title: Greeks.live: The market generally expects significant volatility tonight, and most traders are choosing to stay up late to monitor the market.
data.description: Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, posted a briefing in the Chinese community stating, "The community is clearly divided on market direction: bulls believe a bottom has formed around $88,500 and expect a rebound to the $92,000-$97,000 range; bears, however, emphasize moving average resistance and liquidity issues, believing the rise is merely a rebound opportunity and should be used to short. The key point of contention is whether last night's low of $88,500 is the true bottom, and whether $90,200 and $92,000 can become effective support levels. The market generally expects significant volatility tonight, and most traders are choosing to stay up late monitoring the market."

data.title: Basel Committee Chair Calls for Reevaluation of Crypto Asset Regulations
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Erik Thedéen, Chair of the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision, emphasized the need to reassess global rules regarding banks' exposure to crypto assets. In an interview with the Financial Times, Thedéen highlighted that the current framework, which imposes an extreme risk weight of up to 1250% on banks holding certain crypto assets, was established when the market was far from mature. 

Major jurisdictions like the United States and the United Kingdom have declined to adopt the Basel standards in their current form, underscoring growing inconsistencies in regulatory approaches.

The rules under review were initially drafted several years ago and were set to take effect on January 1, 2026. Under the existing standards, crypto assets operating on permissionless blockchains, including many stablecoins, are rated at the highest risk level, a classification typically reserved for the riskiest banking activities. 

With the circulation of stablecoins nearing $300 billion and their increasing integration into institutional payment systems, regulators are under pressure to reassess whether permissionless systems inherently pose systemic risks.

data.title: Ziggy (ZIGGY) is now available on LBank.

data.title: OKX Boost launches the X Launch project MetYa (MY)
data.description: MetYa, an AI-driven Web3 social payment project, has officially launched its new X Launch event on OKX Boost. The project is named MetYa (MY). Eligible OKX DEX aggregator traders can participate in sharing a 4.1 million MY airdrop reward. MetYa is an AI-driven Web3 social and payment (SocialFi + PayFi) platform that, through its payment system MePay, connects social behavior, token rights, and global consumption scenarios, allowing users to "generate value through social interaction and release value through payments."

data.title: Bitget Wallet encrypted cards introduce a "zero transaction fee" mechanism, enabling wear-free everyday spending.
data.description: Bitget Wallet has officially launched its "zero-fee" encrypted card service, covering over 50 markets globally, including Europe, Latin America, and Asia Pacific. Users can use the card for everyday spending, cross-border payments, and travel expenses through major payment networks such as Visa and Mastercard, achieving zero-cost daily spending. The Bitget Wallet Card provides each user with a monthly zero-fee limit of $400, covering foreign exchange fees, stablecoin deposit or conversion fees, and exchange rate differences. The system automatically detects relevant fees incurred during transactions and refunds them within T+1 to T+3 days, with the actual settlement exchange rate consistent with Google's real-time exchange rate. In addition, Bitget Wallet has launched a personalized encrypted card service, offering custom card designs for the community, brands, and creators. As an important part of the Bitget Wallet payment ecosystem, the encrypted card works in conjunction with services such as QR code payments, bank transfers, and in-app shopping, providing an integrated solution for on-chain and everyday payments while ensuring the security of users' self-custodied assets.

data.title: Ark Invest increased its holdings in Circle, Bullish, and BitMine on Wednesday. BitMine is scheduled to release its new quarterly earnings report on November 21.
data.description: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest increased its holdings of Circle, Bullish, and BitMine shares across three ETFs on Wednesday, for a total of $17.7 million, $16.9 million, and $7.6 million, respectively. Specifically, the ARK Innovation ETF, ARK Next Generation Internet ETF, and ARK Fintech Innovation ETF collectively purchased 216,019 shares of Circle, 463,598 shares of Bullish, and 260,651 shares of BitMine. All three companies' stock prices fell sharply that day. Circle's stock closed down 8.98% at $69.72; Bullish fell 3.63% to $36.39; and BitMine dropped 9.6% to $29.18. Despite stock price volatility, Bullish reported a net profit of $18.5 million in the third quarter, compared to a loss of $67.3 million in the same period last year; Circle's net revenue for the same period was $214 million, a significant increase of 202% year-over-year. BitMine is expected to release its latest quarterly financial report on November 21.

data.title: BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF Bleeds Over $500 Million In Its Biggest One-Day Outflow
data.description:
Nearly two years after the inception of the Bitcoin ETF sector in the United States, these funds are currently grappling with significant challenges, exacerbated by mounting concerns regarding a potential bear market in the coming months. This turmoil is exemplified by the BlackRock iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (IBIT), which experienced its largest single-day withdrawal since launch, further contributing to the decline in Bitcoin’s price. Profit-Taking And Caution The recent outflows from BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF highlight the severity of the current selloff within the Bitcoin market, which has experienced a substantial correction below the crucial $100,000 mark following a record high reached in October. Related Reading: Kraken Achieves $20 Billion Valuation With $200 Million Investment From Citadel This downturn emphasizes the widespread pullback affecting various risk assets, while gold has notably remained resilient
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/blackrocks-bitcoin-etf-bleeds-over-500-million-in-its-biggest-one-day-outflow/

data.title: Binance Offers 1% Cashback on Crypto Purchases with Mastercard
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is launching a limited-time promotion allowing users to earn 1% cashback in USDC on crypto purchases made with Mastercard, including Apple Pay and Google Pay. This offer is available during the Promotion Period from 2025-11-20 08:00 (UTC) to 2025-12-05 23:59 (UTC). To participate, users must confirm their involvement on the activity page and make a crypto purchase using their local currency with Mastercard on the 'Buy Crypto' page. Existing users need to complete a purchase of at least $100, while new users are required to spend a minimum of $50 to qualify for the rewards.

The promotion operates on a first-come, first-served basis, with a maximum cashback cap of $20 per user. Only purchase transactions completed with Mastercard are eligible, excluding deposit transactions. New users are defined as those who have not previously completed any fiat deposits or crypto purchases on Binance via Buy Crypto with Bank Transfer, Credit/Debit Card, or Fiat Deposit before 2025-11-20 08:00 (UTC). The cashback reward will be distributed as USDC token vouchers, with a total budget of 50,000 USDC available for this promotion. Rewards will be distributed within four weeks after the promotion ends, and users must claim their vouchers within 30 days of distribution.

Binance reserves the right to disqualify users involved in dishonest behavior or those who tamper with the program code. The platform may also amend the terms and conditions due to regulatory changes, legal obligations, or technical issues. Users are encouraged to review the additional promotion terms and conditions for more details.

data.title: Nvidia Reports Strong Third Quarter Earnings with Revenue Growth
data.description: According to Foresight News, Nvidia has released its third-quarter financial results, revealing a revenue of $57 billion, marking a 62% increase compared to the previous year. The company's data center revenue reached $51.2 billion, surpassing the anticipated $49 billion. Nvidia's outlook for fourth-quarter revenue is approximately $65 billion, significantly higher than analysts' average estimate of $61.6 billion. Following the earnings announcement, Nvidia's stock price rose by over 4% in after-hours trading. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang noted that sales of Blackwell products were exceptional, and cloud GPUs were completely sold out.

data.title: ARK Invest Expands Crypto Stock Holdings Amid Market Decline
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, ARK Invest, led by Cathie Wood, has increased its investment in crypto-related stocks, acquiring shares in Bullish, Circle Internet Group, and BitMine Immersion Technologies. This move comes as the value of crypto stocks continues to decline. On Wednesday, ARK's Fintech Innovation ETF (ARKF) purchased 48,011 shares of Bullish, while the Next Generation Internet ETF (ARKW) acquired 92,670 shares. The Innovation ETF (ARKK) made the largest acquisition with 322,917 shares, totaling $16.8 million.

In addition to Bullish, ARK made significant purchases of Circle, the company behind the USDC stablecoin. ARKF acquired 22,327 shares, ARKW bought 43,174 shares, and ARKK added 150,518 shares, amounting to approximately $15 million in total. ARK also increased its holdings in BitMine, with ARKF purchasing 26,923 shares, ARKW acquiring 51,954 shares, and ARKK accumulating 181,774 shares, bringing the total investment to $7.6 million.

The acquisitions occurred as crypto-exposed stocks experienced a downturn, with the market retreating from October highs. Bullish saw a 3.63% drop to $36.39, Circle closed down nearly 9% at $69.72, and BitMine ended the day down 9.5% at $29.18, though it recovered over 6% in after-hours trading. Michael Saylor's Bitcoin treasury firm, Strategy, faced a sharper decline, dropping 9.82% before recovering some losses after hours.

ARK's recent buying spree comes amid falling crypto prices, with the firm purchasing $10.2 million worth of BitMine shares earlier in the week as its stock price hit a record low. Meanwhile, Nvidia reported strong earnings, posting $57 billion in revenue and $31.9 billion in profit, surpassing Wall Street expectations. The chip maker's positive forecast for the fourth quarter, predicting $65 billion in revenue, alleviated concerns about cooling AI demand. Nvidia's performance boosted sentiment across tech and crypto-linked equities, with its shares rising over 5% after hours. This momentum extended to major tech companies like Apple, Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, and Meta, all of which saw after-hours gains.
